description: Lara Croft's decades-spanning franchise of action-adventure archaeology, spanning three separate continuities (Core Design classic, Legend trilogy, Survivor trilogy), three films, two Netflix animated seasons, and a graveyard of canceled handheld and Java mobile titles.

media.title: Tomb Raider
media.description: The original — Lara Croft, Atlantis, tank controls, genre-defining 3D platformer.
media.notes: Classic Saga (Continuity 1). Aspyr iOS/Android port available. Remastered 2024 (PS4/PS5/Switch/PC).

media.title: Tomb Raider II
media.description: Dagger of Xian; Venice, Great Wall; larger scope than the original.
media.notes: Classic Saga. Remastered 2024.

media.title: Tomb Raider III
media.description: Non-linear level select across five global locations; arguably the hardest Core Design entry.
media.notes: Classic Saga. Remastered 2025.

media.title: Tomb Raider: The Last Revelation
media.description: Egypt-focused; best classic-era gameplay; ends with Lara's apparent death.
media.notes: Classic Saga. Remastered 2025.

media.title: Tomb Raider (Game Boy Color)
media.description: 2D side-scrolling portable spin-off; standalone story; first handheld TR.
media.notes: Standalone — no continuity connection. GBC emulation (Gambatte) only. Never re-released.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Chronicles
media.description: Flashback anthology set at Lara's memorial; the weakest Core Design entry.
media.notes: Classic Saga. Remastered 2025. Skip-friendly.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Curse of the Sword (GBC)
media.description: Sequel to the GBC original; 2D platformer with a supernatural sword storyline.
media.notes: Standalone. GBC emulation only. Never re-released.

media.title: Tomb Raider: The Angel of Darkness
media.description: Troubled Core Design finale; dark Paris noir story; buggy at launch but narratively ambitious.
media.notes: Classic Saga finale. Remastered 2025 fixes worst bugs. PC/PCSX2 for original version.

media.title: Tomb Raider: The Prophecy (GBA)
media.description: Top-down isometric handheld spin-off; third in the portable trilogy.
media.notes: Standalone. GBA emulation (mGBA). Never re-released.

media.title: Tomb Raider (Nokia N-Gage)
media.description: Port of TR1 for Nokia's gaming phone; obscure and effectively inaccessible today.
media.notes: Defunct. N-Gage hardware required.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Apocalypse — Eye of Osiris (Java)
media.description: First of three Java iTV tie-in games; Egypt-themed.
media.notes: Defunct — Java/J2ME. iTV tie-in series pt. 1.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Apocalypse — The Shadow Falls (Java)
media.description: Second Java iTV tie-in title.
media.notes: Defunct — Java/J2ME. iTV tie-in series pt. 2.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Apocalypse — The Last Midnight (Java)
media.description: Third and final Java iTV tie-in title.
media.notes: Defunct — Java/J2ME. iTV tie-in series pt. 3.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Temple of Anubis (Java)
media.description: Standalone Egypt-themed Java mobile puzzle/adventure game.
media.notes: Defunct — Java/J2ME.

media.title: Tomb Raider: The Osiris Codex (Java)
media.description: Standalone Java mobile adventure; Egyptian setting.
media.notes: Defunct — Java/J2ME.

media.title: Tomb Raider (Pocket PC)
media.description: Port of TR1 for Windows CE Pocket PC handhelds.
media.notes: Defunct. Requires vintage PDA hardware.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Quest for Cinnabar (Java)
media.description: China-themed Java mobile adventure.
media.notes: Defunct — Java/J2ME.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Elixir of Life (Java)
media.description: Standalone Java mobile puzzle/adventure.
media.notes: Defunct — Java/J2ME.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Legend
media.description: Complete series reboot; fluid controls, Hollywood action tone; best entry point for the Legend trilogy.
media.notes: Legend Trilogy (Continuity 2). GBA/NDS versions are stripped-down side-scrollers, different gameplay.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Legend (GBA)
media.description: 2D side-scrolling adaptation of Legend's story for Game Boy Advance.
media.notes: Standalone adaptation. GBA emulation (mGBA).

media.title: Lara Croft's Poker Party (Java)
media.description: Officially licensed poker game featuring Lara Croft; purely novelty.
media.notes: Defunct — Java/J2ME. Non-canon.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Puzzle Paradox (Java)
media.description: Standalone Java mobile puzzle game.
media.notes: Defunct — Java/J2ME.

media.title: Tomb Raider: The Reckoning (iTV)
media.description: Interactive TV game exclusive to UK Sky Digital; completely inaccessible today.
media.notes: Defunct. Interactive TV platform.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Anniversary
media.description: Full remake of TR1 in the Legend engine; best way to experience the original Atlantis story.
media.notes: Legend Trilogy. Anniversary is the Legend-continuity retelling of TR1.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Anniversary (Java)
media.description: Java mobile adaptation of Anniversary's story.
media.notes: Defunct — Java/J2ME. Last Java TR release.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Underworld
media.description: Legend trilogy conclusion; Nordic mythology, Lara's mother's fate; two Xbox 360 DLC episodes extend the ending.
media.notes: Legend Trilogy finale. PS2/Wii versions downgraded. DLC: Beneath the Ashes + Lara's Shadow.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Underworld (Java)
media.description: Java mobile adaptation of Underworld; final Java TR release.
media.notes: Defunct — Java/J2ME.

media.title: Lara Croft and the Guardian of Light
media.description: Top-down co-op action spinoff; completely different gameplay but excellent, especially two-player.
media.notes: Spinoff — not Tomb Raider branded. iOS/Android port available (may be delisted).

media.title: Lara Croft and the Temple of Osiris
media.description: Sequel to Guardian of Light; up to 4-player co-op; Egypt setting.
media.notes: Spinoff. No Tomb Raider branding.

media.title: Tomb Raider (2013)
media.description: Gritty origin story reboot; Yamatai island; best entry point for new players; over 14.5 million copies sold.
media.notes: Survivor Trilogy (Continuity 3). Definitive Edition on PS4/XBO recommended.

media.title: Rise of the Tomb Raider
media.description: Siberia, the Divine Source, immortality; larger than 2013 and the best-playing Survivor entry.
media.notes: Survivor Trilogy. 20 Year Celebration edition includes all DLC. Timed Xbox exclusive.

media.title: Shadow of the Tomb Raider
media.description: Survivor trilogy conclusion; Peru, Mayan apocalypse; darkest and most puzzle-heavy entry.
media.notes: Survivor Trilogy finale. Definitive Edition includes all DLC.

media.title: Lara Croft GO
media.description: Turn-based puzzle game with minimalist art; the best mobile TR title; won multiple mobile GOTY awards.
media.notes: Paid (~$5). iOS/Android/PC. PS4/Vita version available.

media.title: Lara Croft: Relic Run
media.description: Endless runner blending TR platforming with fast-paced mobile mechanics; free-to-play.
media.notes: Delisted from major app stores — may be sideloadable.

media.title: Tomb Raider Reloaded
media.description: Top-down arcade shooter with cartoonish classic-era Lara; free-to-play with gacha monetization.
media.notes: F2P. Still available on iOS/Android as of 2025.

media.title: Tomb Raider I–III Remastered
media.description: Remasters of TR1, TR2, and TR3 with toggle between classic and HD visuals; best way to play the originals today.
media.notes: Covers Classic Saga entries 1–3. Switch version enables handheld play.

media.title: Tomb Raider IV–VI Remastered
media.description: Remasters of The Last Revelation, Chronicles, and Angel of Darkness; redeems AoD somewhat.
media.notes: Covers Classic Saga entries 4–6.

media.title: Revisioned: Tomb Raider
media.description: Eight animated short films by different studios, each with a distinct visual style; Minnie Driver voices Lara.
media.notes: Anthology web series, originally GameTrailers-exclusive. Available via YouTube archives. First animated TR.

media.title: Tomb Raider: The Legend of Lara Croft — Season 1
media.description: Netflix animated series set post-Shadow of the Tomb Raider; Hayley Atwell voices Lara; Chinese mythology artifact arc.
media.notes: Survivor Continuity. Netflix. Watch after completing the Survivor Trilogy.

media.title: Tomb Raider: The Legend of Lara Croft — Season 2
media.description: Final season; Lara pursues stolen African Orisha masks with friend Sam; premiered December 11, 2025.
media.notes: Survivor Continuity. Netflix. Series finale.

media.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider
media.description: First live-action film starring Angelina Jolie; financially successful, critically panned; campy early-2000s action tone.
media.notes: Isolated film continuity — not canon to any game timeline.

media.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life
media.description: Sequel to the first Jolie film; Pandora's Box, Atlantean mythology; lower box office ended the Jolie era.
media.notes: Isolated film continuity.

media.title: Tomb Raider (2018)
media.description: Alicia Vikander reboot based on the 2013 game; Yamatai, Himiko; better reviewed than the Jolie films.
media.notes: Separate film continuity — Survivor-adjacent but not a strict adaptation.

media.title: Tomb Raider (Amazon Prime Video series)
media.description: Live-action series with Sophie Turner as Lara Croft; written and produced by Phoebe Waller-Bridge; in production as of 2025.
media.notes: New continuity. Not yet released.

media.title: Tomb Raider (Dark Horse Comics, 2014–2016)
media.description: 12-issue Gail Simone run set between TR2013 and Rise of the Tomb Raider; collected in two trade paperbacks.
media.notes: Canon to Survivor Trilogy. Dark Horse.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Survivor's Crusade
media.description: 4-issue miniseries set between Rise and Shadow of the Tomb Raider.
media.notes: Canon to Survivor Trilogy. Dark Horse.

media.title: Tomb Raider: Inferno
media.description: 4-issue tie-in comic released alongside Shadow of the Tomb Raider.
media.notes: Canon to Survivor Trilogy. Dark Horse.

media.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (Top Cow Comics)
media.description: Original comic series from Top Cow/Image set in the classic-era continuity; out of print.
media.notes: Classic Saga adjacent. Not canon to any specific game continuity.
